title: Pilot Loop3: improve portfolio card legend clarity for signal confidence
problem: Users can misread confidence semantics in portfolio insight cards, which reduces decision trust.
evidence: benchmark tools display confidence legends explicitly
proposed_change: Add concise confidence legend and short explanation line in PublicPortfolioView insight area.
expected_benefit: Higher interpretability of generated insights and fewer user clarification loops.
success_metrics: Legend visible in mobile and desktop
No visual regression in insight card
